title: Sports Nutrition Creator Fit
content: Fitness creators with high save rates and workout tutorials convert strongly for protein, recovery, and performance nutrition campaigns.

title: Clean Beauty Audience Signals
content: Beauty creators with science-backed routines and high comment depth perform best for skincare launches targeting 18-34 female audiences.

title: Luxury Editorial Partnerships
content: Luxury fashion partnerships require high audience quality, editorial visual consistency, and low bot engagement probability.

title: FinTech Trust Requirements
content: Finance creators need authenticity scores above 85, transparent disclosures, and audience interest in business and investing topics.
